case_title: MOON HING LAU VS. FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2013 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JUN-20-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER--TRACY WY. PLAINTIFF TO BRING HIS OWN INTERPRETER AT THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LAU, MOON HING AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ALAN LIANG--CLAIMS ADJUSTER. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---ALAN KWAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2013 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, MOON HING AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (D.E. HOHL:AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS) *(SIGNED)* SERVED APR-26-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, MOON HING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
